nodes.name: 云雾森林
nodes.summary: 云雾森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Black guan、Red-faced guan、紫冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Zosterops
nodes.summary: Zosterops（Zosterops）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联103种鸟类，如Sri Lanka white-eye、Black-capped white-eye、Ashy-bellied white-eye等103种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 动物界

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: Taita white-eye
nodes.summary: Taita white-eye (Zosterops silvanus) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It includes numerous subspecies, sometimes considered a subspecies to montane white-eye (Z. poliogastrus). It is only found in Taita Hills in southeastern Kenya. IUCN categorizes it as vulnerable. It is threatened by severe habitat loss and fragmentation, mainly as a result of the deforestation of the Taita Hills. It breeds in cloud forests. It is often observed in mixed flocks with the pale white-eye. References
